World.title: The looks turning heads on the Met Gala carpet
World.description: The theme for 2026 Met Gala fundraiser is "Costume Art", exploring fashion as an embodied art form.

World.title: Iran war live: Washington, Tehran trade threats over Strait of Hormuz
World.description: Israeli attacks have killed 2,696 people in Lebanon since March 2, the country's Health Ministry reports.
